scope: source-model inventory of required mounted-userspace performance and fault evidence for local successor/comparator wording

required_before_admission: current TideFS mounted local run artifact
matching incumbent run or explicit non-incumbent comparison boundary
workload, media, mount tier, and durability attribution
rows.refusal_reason: No current artifact in this issue records matched local mounted performance data for TideFS and an incumbent under the same envelope.
Current source and registry state do not prove local metadata operation parity or performance standing against OpenZFS, DRBD, ext4, XFS, or other local filesystems.

required_before_admission: named crash or restart injection point
rows.refusal_reason: The issue provides a local successor artifact owner but does not add new crash, fsync, restart, or recovery runtime proof.

required_before_admission: bounded comparison target and non-comparable case list
rows.refusal_reason: Current evidence remains bounded to source review in this issue and does not establish local device fault behavior as an incumbent comparison.

non_claims: The row set is an inventory and fail-closed refusal record.
It does not report TideFS as faster, safer, more available, production-ready, release-ready, or an incumbent-class local filesystem.
It does not admit distributed, clustered, RDMA, block-volume, or OpenZFS/Ceph-class behavior.
residual_risk: The rows intentionally leave local successor/comparator performance text unadmitted.
Future mounted runtime artifacts must update this file or add a successor-specific artifact before publishing-facing wording can consume them.
